title: Part 3: What a Transformer Block Does

cues.label: Input 000s
cues.headline: Hidden-state rows enter the block: Name L by D
cues.narration: At 0 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Name L by D. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Input 005s
cues.headline: Hidden-state rows enter the block: Rows are token positions
cues.narration: At 5 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Rows are token positions. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Input 010s
cues.headline: Hidden-state rows enter the block: Columns are hidden features
cues.narration: At 10 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Columns are hidden features. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Input 015s
cues.headline: Hidden-state rows enter the block: No context mixed yet
cues.narration: At 15 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: No context mixed yet. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Input 020s
cues.headline: Hidden-state rows enter the block: Block sees numbers, not text
cues.narration: At 20 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Block sees numbers, not text. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 025s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: The table shape stays L by D
cues.narration: At 25 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: The table shape stays L by D. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 030s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Context is now in the rows
cues.narration: At 30 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Context is now in the rows. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 035s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Make query/key score grid
cues.narration: At 35 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Make query/key score grid. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 040s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Bright cells show which tokens are read
cues.narration: At 40 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Bright cells show which tokens are read. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 045s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Weighted mix pulls context
cues.narration: At 45 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Weighted mix pulls context. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 050s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Each row gets a context update
cues.narration: At 50 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Each row gets a context update. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Attention 055s
cues.headline: Rows read from other rows: Attention mixes positions
cues.narration: At 55 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Attention mixes positions. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 060s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Add update to old row
cues.narration: At 60 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Add update to old row. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 065s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Residual path preserves previous signal
cues.narration: At 65 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Residual path preserves previous signal. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 070s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Normalize scale
cues.narration: At 70 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Normalize scale. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 075s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Stabilize before the next sublayer
cues.narration: At 75 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Stabilize before the next sublayer. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 080s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Do not lose the highway
cues.narration: At 80 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Do not lose the highway. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: ResidualNorm 085s
cues.headline: Residual addition keeps the old signal available: Rows remain comparable
cues.narration: At 85 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Rows remain comparable. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 090s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Create feature update
cues.narration: At 90 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Create feature update. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 095s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: MLP does not mix positions
cues.narration: At 95 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: MLP does not mix positions. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 100s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Attention already supplied context
cues.narration: At 100 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Attention already supplied context. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 105s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Work on one row at a time
cues.narration: At 105 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Work on one row at a time. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 110s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Expand hidden features
cues.narration: At 110 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Expand hidden features. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 115s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Apply activation gate
cues.narration: At 115 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Apply activation gate. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: MLP 120s
cues.headline: The MLP edits each row independently: Compress back to D
cues.narration: At 120 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Compress back to D. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Output 125s
cues.headline: The same shape leaves with richer values: Add MLP update back
cues.narration: At 125 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Add MLP update back. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Output 130s
cues.headline: The same shape leaves with richer values: Normalize again
cues.narration: At 130 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Normalize again. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Output 135s
cues.headline: The same shape leaves with richer values: Return same L by D shape
cues.narration: At 135 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Return same L by D shape. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Output 140s
cues.headline: The same shape leaves with richer values: Values are richer than input
cues.narration: At 140 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Values are richer than input. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Output 145s
cues.headline: The same shape leaves with richer values: Next block can repeat
cues.narration: At 145 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Next block can repeat. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Logits next 150s
cues.headline: The output head will turn rows into logits later: Final row can feed output head
cues.narration: At 150 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Final row can feed output head. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Logits next 155s
cues.headline: The output head will turn rows into logits later: Vocabulary scores come later
cues.narration: At 155 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Vocabulary scores come later. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.

cues.label: Logits next 160s
cues.headline: The output head will turn rows into logits later: Training will supervise logits
cues.narration: At 160 seconds, focus on this moving part of the transformer block: Training will supervise logits. The scene should show the actual matrix, row, score, or layer object changing, not just repeat the transcript.
